backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a school inventory and billing system with functions to add/update inventory items, create bills (with stock deduction), and query bills by date and totals.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'invalidate useGetTotals after bill creation' feature to its implementation file and test ID REQ-13.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON map of all frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to the school's inventory management system and mounting the app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with auth-guarded routes (dashboard, inventory, billing, reports), a QueryClientProvider, and a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BillLineItem.tsx: Single row component for the billing form featuring an item selector, quantity input, unit price display, subtotal, stock validation error, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/EditItemModal.ts: Dialog modal for editing an existing inventory item's name, category, quantity, and price, using the useUpdateItem mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/InventoryTable.t: Renders a table of inventory items with name, category, quantity (color-coded for low/zero stock), and price columns, plus Edit and Add Stock action buttons per row.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a collapsible sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Inventory, Billing, Reports), a top header, and an Outlet for page content, along with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/Login.tsx: Login page component with username/password form that authenticates via the useAuth hook and redirects to the dashboard on success, showing validation and error alerts.
frontend/src/components/PrintableBill.ts: A print-only receipt component that displays bill number, date, time, student info, itemized purchase table, and grand total formatted for thermal/narrow paper printing.
frontend/src/components/RemainingStockTa: Displays a read-only table of inventory items showing item name, category, and remaining stock quantity with color-coded indicators for low or zero stock.
frontend/src/components/ReportSummary.ts: Shows three summary stat cards for a report: grand total revenue, total units sold, and total income, each with a distinct icon and color scheme.
frontend/src/components/SalesTable.tsx: Renders a table of sales rows with item name, quantity sold, and amount earned columns, displaying a placeholder message when no records exist.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: A reusable dashboard stat card component that displays a title, value, icon, and optional subtitle with a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStockModal: A modal dialog component that allows users to add additional quantity to an existing inventory item, using the useUpdateItem mutation and displaying success/error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: A simple session-based authentication hook that validates hardcoded credentials and persists login state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including inventory CRUD (getItems, addItem, updateItem) and billing (createBill, getBillsByDate, getNextBillNumber, totals).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color palette (light and dark modes) including brand, semantic, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/src/lib/constants.ts: Exports a static array of inventory category names used across the application.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that returns the current date as a YYYY-MM-DD string adjusted to India Standard Time (UTC+5:30).
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a cn helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Billing.tsx: A billing page where users can create bills by selecting inventory items, specifying student details and payment mode, then saving and printing the generated bill.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Displays a dashboard with four summary cards (total items, stock available, stock sold today, income today) fetched via useGetTotals, plus a quick-guide section. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds and shows an error alert on fetch failure.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Renders the inventory management page with a form to add new items (name, category, quantity, price) and a table listing existing items with edit and stock-update modal support. Uses React Query mutations and per-field validation before calling the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Provides a date-filtered sales report page defaulting to today's IST date, aggregating bill data into per-item sales rows and displaying summary cards, a sales table, and a remaining stock table.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (brand, emerald, amber, rose, sidebar, chart), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 11, recording existing implemented features (billing fields, IST-based dashboard/reports, query invalidation) and pending new feature requests such as adding a login page.
